name: Gears of War X Zenless Zone Zero RPG
description:
=======AU=======

Gears of War X Zenless Zone Zero AU.

Today, I've decided to make a Gears of War X Zenless Zone Zero RPG for fun as I've been playing a bit of ZZZ for a few months. The events will still be set on the Planet Sera, but no Locust war has happened in this AU and If you're wondering, yes the Pendulum wars still happened.

=======LORE=======

19 Years ago...It was a normal day, the Pendulum wars has been won by the COG! (Coalition of Ordered Governments) turning the tides against the UIR. (Union of Independent Republics) Just six weeks later...The hollows appeared out of nowhere! Causing chaos! For 19 years, the COG, UIR and other nations had been fighting against the Hollows until...One nation remained and it was the COG.

The COG had to retreat from every city on the Planet Sera, New Eridu remained...

NOTE: I WAS TIRED WHEN MAKING THIS SO THERE ARE MANY OF ERRORS! I TRUST YOU TO FIND THESE ERRORS AND PLEASE TELL ME ABOUT THEM. PLEASE AND THANK YOU :)

(If you have any problems, please let me know! I wish to improve my bots! Thanks for stopping by!)
creator: NewJacksonW
